summary.zh: Agentic AI 指具備較高自主性的 AI 應用型態。
summary.en: A core concept for understanding AI model capabilities and GenAI product behavior.

explanation.zh:
Agentic AI 不是單純一問一答，而是能為了達成目標，自行規劃一連串步驟、選擇工具、執行任務，並依照中間結果調整策略。

與一般 chatbot（聊天機器人）的差異在於，自主性較高的 AI 可能主動判斷下一步，例如先查文件、再比對資料、再呼叫系統、最後產生可執行結果。這也代表產品設計需要更明確的權限、邊界、失敗處理與人工確認點。
explanation.en:
Agentic AI refers to AI systems that can plan steps, use tools, observe results, and adjust their actions to complete a goal. It moves beyond one-turn response generation into task execution.

A practical agentic workflow may involve interpreting a request, deciding which tool to call, checking intermediate results, and continuing until the task is complete or needs human input. This can create powerful automation, but also introduces new risks around autonomy, permissions, and failure recovery.

The key product question is not only whether the agent can complete the task once, but whether it can do so safely and reliably across real-world variations.

pm_notes.zh:
Agentic AI 適合流程明確、工具可控、風險可分級的任務。涉及高風險決策、對外通知、敏感操作或合規判斷時，應加入人工審核與操作限制。

可採取行動：在需求文件中拆出 AI 可自主執行的步驟、可使用工具、不可執行事項與需要人工確認的節點。
pm_notes.en: PMs should scope agentic features carefully. Higher autonomy can increase value, but it also requires clear permissions, observability, fallback paths, audit logs, and human confirmation for high-risk actions. Use it to clarify scope: what the system should do, what it should not do, and how success will be measured.

summary.zh: AI Agent 是能理解目標、拆解步驟、使用工具並執行多步驟任務的 AI 系統。
summary.en: A core concept for understanding AI model capabilities and GenAI product behavior.

explanation.zh:
AI Agent 是能理解目標、拆解步驟、使用工具並執行多步驟任務的 AI 系統。它比單純聊天機器人更進階，因為它不只回答，還可能規劃與操作。

Agent（智能代理）可能具備：任務拆解、資料查詢、工具呼叫、根據中間結果調整下一步、完成多步驟工作。例如「整理本週申訴或服務品質問題重點並產生 email 草稿」可能涉及搜尋資料、摘要、分類、撰寫與建立草稿。
explanation.en:
An AI agent is a system that uses a model to pursue a task across multiple steps. It may reason over context, retrieve information, call tools, write files, update records, or trigger workflow actions.

Unlike a basic chatbot, an agent needs an operating boundary: what it can access, what it can change, when it should stop, and when it should ask for approval. The more tools an agent can use, the more the product must manage permissions, errors, and auditability.

Agent behavior is best designed as a workflow with observable steps, not as a single open-ended instruction.

pm_notes.zh:
Agent（智能代理）自主性越高，風險也越高。若沒有權限控管與人工確認，可能查錯資料、誤發信、誤執行操作或產生不可追溯的流程。

可採取行動：為每個 agent（智能代理）任務定義成功條件、失敗條件、工具權限與 fallback（備援處理），避免只用「自動完成任務」描述需求。
pm_notes.en: PMs should define the agent’s allowed actions, success criteria, failure handling, and human approval points before launch. Treat each tool the agent can use as part of the product scope and risk surface. Use it to clarify scope: what the system should do, what it should not do, and how success will be measured.

summary.zh: 協助人類完成工作而非完全取代人。
summary.en: A core concept for understanding AI model capabilities and GenAI product behavior.

explanation.zh:
AI Copilot 是協助人類完成工作、提高效率或降低認知負擔的 AI 功能，而不是完全取代人做決策。常見形式包含產生草稿、摘要內容、提出建議、整理檢查清單、補全程式碼或提示下一步。

Copilot 的重點是「人機協作」：AI 負責降低起手成本或提供候選方案，人類仍負責判斷、確認與承擔結果。若產品設計沒有清楚標示 AI 的角色與限制，使用者可能誤以為輸出可以直接採用。
explanation.en:
An AI copilot is an assistant designed to help a person complete work rather than fully automate the workflow. It may draft, summarize, recommend, classify, or explain.

Copilot experiences usually keep the human in control, with the AI producing suggestions that users can review, edit, or approve.

In product work, the main value is knowing what this capability can support and where it can fail. PMs should connect the concept to real use cases, data availability, evaluation criteria, and user expectations instead of treating it as a generic AI label.

pm_notes.zh: Copilot（AI 副駕駛）適合高價值、重複性高、但仍需要人工判斷的工作。PM 應定義哪些輸出可以直接使用、哪些需要人工確認，以及如何衡量採用率、修改率與使用者信任。
pm_notes.en:
PMs should define where human judgment remains required. The success metric is often not full automation, but better speed, consistency, or decision support.

Use it to clarify scope: what the system should do, what it should not do, and how success will be measured.

summary.zh: AI 是讓機器模擬人類智慧行為的技術總稱，包括理解語言、辨識圖片、預測結果、做決策、規劃任務與自動化流程。
summary.en: A core concept for understanding AI model capabilities and GenAI product behavior.

explanation.zh:
AI 是讓機器模擬人類智慧行為的技術總稱，包括理解語言、辨識圖片、預測結果、做決策、規劃任務與自動化流程。GenAI 是 AI 的其中一個分支，不是所有 AI 都是 GenAI。

常見類型包含：規則型 AI、機器學習、深度學習、生成式 AI。規則型 AI 依照人工規則運作；機器學習從資料中學習規律；深度學習透過多層神經網路處理複雜資料；GenAI 則進一步產生新內容。
explanation.en:
Artificial intelligence is the broad field of building systems that perform tasks normally associated with human intelligence, such as language understanding, prediction, recognition, planning, recommendation, or decision support.

GenAI is only one branch of AI. Many AI systems classify items, predict outcomes, detect anomalies, rank results, or recommend actions without generating new text or images.

This distinction matters because different AI problems require different data, models, metrics, controls, and product designs.

pm_notes.zh: 討論需求時要先釐清使用的是傳統 ML、規則引擎、搜尋系統，還是 GenAI。不同技術的成本、風險、資料需求與評估方式都不相同。
pm_notes.en: PMs should clarify whether a use case needs generation, prediction, search, classification, automation, or analytics. Not every AI requirement needs an LLM, and choosing the wrong approach can add unnecessary cost and risk. Use it to clarify scope: what the system should do, what it should not do, and how success will be measured.

primary_sources.title: IBM Think - What is artificial intelligence?
Google for Developers - Machine Learning Glossary

summary.zh: 與使用者對話的系統，可為規則型、NLP 型或 GenAI 型。
summary.en: A core concept for understanding AI model capabilities and GenAI product behavior.

explanation.zh:
Chatbot 是與使用者對話的系統，可為規則型、NLP 型或 GenAI 型。規則型 chatbot 通常依照預先設計的流程回覆；GenAI chatbot 則能處理更開放的問題，但輸出也較不確定。

在產品設計上，chatbot 不只是「能聊天」的介面，還需要明確的回答範圍、資料來源、失敗處理、轉人工機制與安全限制。若沒有邊界設計，使用者可能在高風險情境中得到不完整或不可靠的回答。
explanation.en:
A chatbot is a conversational interface that lets users interact with a system through messages. It may be rule-based, retrieval-based, LLM-powered, or a mix of these approaches.

A GenAI chatbot can answer more flexibly than a scripted bot, but it also needs stronger controls around accuracy, scope, and unsupported questions.

In product work, the main value is knowing what this capability can support and where it can fail. PMs should connect the concept to real use cases, data availability, evaluation criteria, and user expectations instead of treating it as a generic AI label.

pm_notes.zh:
PM 要明確定義 chatbot的回答範圍、資料來源、轉人工條件、失敗話術與風險控管。

可採取行動：定義 chatbot 的回答邊界、轉人工規則、不可回答情境與標準失敗話術。
pm_notes.en:
PMs should separate the chat interface from the intelligence behind it. A good chatbot design still needs clear intents, fallback behavior, escalation rules, and success metrics.

Use it to clarify scope: what the system should do, what it should not do, and how success will be measured.

primary_sources.title: IBM Think - What is a chatbot?
OpenAI API - Text generation

summary.zh: 深度學習是機器學習的分支，使用多層神經網路處理複雜資料，特別適合文字、圖片、聲音、影片等非結構化資料。
summary.en: A core concept for understanding AI model capabilities and GenAI product behavior.

explanation.zh:
深度學習是機器學習的分支，使用多層神經網路處理複雜資料，特別適合文字、圖片、聲音、影片等非結構化資料。

技術原理：神經網路由多層運算節點組成，每一層會抽取不同層次的特徵。以圖片為例，前面幾層可能學到線條與邊緣，中間層學到形狀，後面層學到物件概念。文字模型則透過大量參數學習語句與語意關係。
explanation.en:
Deep learning is a machine learning approach that uses multi-layer neural networks to learn patterns from data. It is especially useful for complex inputs such as text, images, audio, and video.

Modern LLMs, vision models, speech models, and many multimodal systems are built with deep learning techniques.

In product work, the main value is knowing what this capability can support and where it can fail. PMs should connect the concept to real use cases, data availability, evaluation criteria, and user expectations instead of treating it as a generic AI label.

pm_notes.zh: 現代 LLM、影像生成、語音模型大多建立在深度學習上，因此硬體資源、資料品質、訓練成本與推論效能都會成為專案規劃重點。
pm_notes.en:
PMs do not need to design neural networks, but should understand that deep learning systems require data, evaluation, compute resources, and ongoing monitoring.

Use it to clarify scope: what the system should do, what it should not do, and how success will be measured.

primary_sources.title: IBM Think - What is deep learning?
Google for Developers - Machine Learning Glossary

summary.zh: 基礎模型是經大量通用資料預訓練、可再適配不同任務的大型 AI 模型。
summary.en: A core concept for understanding AI model capabilities and GenAI product behavior.

explanation.zh:
基礎模型是經大量通用資料預訓練的大型 AI 模型，具備廣泛能力，可再透過 Prompt（提示詞）、RAG（檢索增強生成）、Fine-tuning（微調）或工具串接適配不同任務。LLM（大型語言模型）、影像生成模型、語音模型都可能是基礎模型。

技術原理：基礎模型先在大規模資料上學習通用表示與生成能力，再透過指令微調、人類回饋或企業應用層設計，使模型更能服從指令與完成任務。
explanation.en:
A foundation model is a large model trained on broad data so it can be adapted to many downstream tasks. LLMs, vision models, and multimodal models can all be foundation models.

Most enterprise GenAI products start from an existing foundation model and adapt it with prompts, retrieval, tools, or fine-tuning rather than training a new model from scratch.

In product work, the main value is knowing what this capability can support and where it can fail. PMs should connect the concept to real use cases, data availability, evaluation criteria, and user expectations instead of treating it as a generic AI label.

pm_notes.zh: 企業通常不會從零訓練基礎模型，而是選用既有模型，再搭配知識庫、權限控管、Prompt與系統流程，做出可落地的應用。
pm_notes.en:
PMs should avoid assuming that a new model must be trained. First evaluate whether an existing model plus RAG, tools, or prompt design can meet the requirement.

Use it to clarify scope: what the system should do, what it should not do, and how success will be measured.

primary_sources.title: IBM Think - What are foundation models?
NIST - AI RMF Generative AI Profile

summary.zh: 生成式 AI 是能夠「產生新內容」的人工智慧技術，輸出可以是文字、圖片、程式碼、摘要、表格、簡報或語音。
summary.en: A core concept for understanding AI model capabilities and GenAI product behavior.

explanation.zh:
生成式 AI 是能夠「產生新內容」的人工智慧技術，輸出可以是文字、圖片、程式碼、摘要、表格、簡報或語音。它和傳統只做分類、預測、排序的 AI 不同，重點在於根據輸入內容與模型學到的模式，生成一段新的結果。

技術原理：模型會透過大量資料學習語言、圖像或多模態資料中的統計規律。以文字模型為例，它通常不是像資料庫一樣查出答案，而是根據目前上下文推測下一個最可能的 token（語詞單位），逐步生成完整回覆。
explanation.en:
Generative AI is AI that creates new content, such as text, code, images, audio, video, summaries, or structured outputs. It differs from traditional AI systems that mainly classify, rank, score, or predict.

GenAI is especially useful for language-heavy work such as drafting, summarization, knowledge Q&A, translation, and content transformation. However, generated outputs are probabilistic and may be incomplete, inconsistent, outdated, or unsupported by sources.

A practical GenAI product usually needs quality evaluation, grounding, usage limits, safety controls, and a clear definition of when the user or a reviewer makes the final decision.

pm_notes.zh:
GenAI 專案不能只驗證「能不能回答」，還要確認回答是否正確、是否有依據、是否可控、是否符合資安與合規要求，以及是否能穩定嵌入實際業務流程。

可採取行動：在 PoC（概念驗證）評估表中同時納入輸出品質、資料依據、風險控管、使用者接受度與成本估算。
pm_notes.en: PMs should define exactly what the AI is expected to generate, who will use the output, and how correctness will be checked. Treat quality, safety, cost, and workflow integration as part of the product requirement, not as post-launch cleanup.

primary_sources.title: IBM Think - What is generative AI?
NIST - AI RMF Generative AI Profile

summary.zh: 大型語言模型是專門處理與生成自然語言的模型，可用於問答、摘要、翻譯、分類、改寫、撰寫文件與產生程式碼。
summary.en: A core concept for understanding AI model capabilities and GenAI product behavior.

explanation.zh:
大型語言模型是專門處理與生成自然語言的模型，可用於問答、摘要、翻譯、分類、改寫、撰寫文件與產生程式碼。

技術原理：LLM（大型語言模型）透過大量文字資料訓練，學習語言結構、上下文關係、常識性知識與推理模式。使用者輸入問題後，模型會根據 system prompt（系統提示詞）、user message、歷史對話與外部資料，逐步預測下一個 token（語詞單位）並生成回答。
explanation.en:
A large language model is trained on large amounts of text to understand and generate language. It can summarize, translate, classify, answer questions, draft content, and generate code.

An LLM is not a database or a source-of-truth system. Its output depends on the model version, prompt, context, retrieved information, tool results, and evaluation process around it. It can sound fluent even when the answer is incomplete or unsupported.

In product design, the model is only one part of the system. Reliability also depends on data access, grounding, guardrails, latency, cost, and human review when needed.

pm_notes.zh:
選模型不只看能力，還要評估成本、延遲、中文能力、資料安全、供應商 SLA、API（應用程式介面）限制、部署方式、是否支援工具呼叫，以及是否符合企業治理要求。

可採取行動：建立模型選型比較表，至少比較能力、中文表現、成本、latency、context window、資料處理方式與版本更新風險。
pm_notes.en: PMs should separate model capability from product readiness. A strong demo does not mean the feature is production-ready. Validate accuracy, safety, latency, cost, integrations, fallback behavior, and user workflow fit with realistic scenarios. Use it to clarify scope: what the system should do, what it should not do, and how success will be measured.

primary_sources.title: IBM Think - What are large language models?
OpenAI API - Text generation

summary.zh: 機器學習是 AI 的一種方法，核心是讓電腦從資料中學習規律，而不是由人手動寫死每一條規則。
summary.en: A core concept for understanding AI model capabilities and GenAI product behavior.

explanation.zh:
機器學習是 AI 的一種方法，核心是讓電腦從資料中學習規律，而不是由人手動寫死每一條規則。模型會從歷史資料中學習輸入與輸出之間的關係，之後遇到新資料時進行預測或判斷。

技術原理：例如用使用者行為、歷史紀錄與目標結果訓練模型，模型會學習哪些特徵與結果較相關。訓練完成後，模型可對新案例輸出分類、分數或預測結果。

與 GenAI 的關係：大型語言模型也是機器學習與深度學習的成果，只是規模更大、輸出目標是文字或內容生成，而不只是分類或預測。
explanation.en:
Machine learning is an approach to AI where systems learn patterns from data instead of relying only on manually written rules. A model is trained on examples and then used to make predictions, classifications, recommendations, rankings, or other outputs for new cases.

Machine learning is broader than GenAI. Many systems used for scoring, forecasting, anomaly detection, recommendations, and classification are ML systems even if they do not generate text or images.

Good ML outcomes depend on data quality, representative examples, clear target definitions, and evaluation metrics that match the real business problem.

pm_notes.zh: PM 要確認資料是否足夠、標籤是否一致、測試資料是否代表真實情境，否則模型上線後可能表現落差很大。
pm_notes.en: PMs should clarify the prediction target, available data, success metric, and failure cost before positioning a problem as ML or GenAI. Data quality and evaluation design often matter as much as model choice. Use it to clarify scope: what the system should do, what it should not do, and how success will be measured.

primary_sources.title: IBM Think - What is machine learning?
Google for Developers - Machine Learning Glossary

summary.zh: 能同時處理多種資料型態，例如文字、圖片、音訊、影片、表格或文件。
summary.en: A core concept for understanding AI model capabilities and GenAI product behavior.

explanation.zh:
Multimodal AI 是能處理多種資料型態的 AI，例如文字、圖片、音訊、影片、表格或文件。常見應用包含讀圖問答、文件理解、會議錄音摘要、語音互動與圖片文字抽取。

多模態能力不只是在模型輸入中加入圖片或音訊，也牽涉到前處理品質、檔案格式、OCR/ASR 準確度、敏感資訊遮罩與錯誤辨識風險。PM 在規劃時應確認模型是否真的理解內容，而不是只根據版面、上下文或不完整訊號推測。
explanation.en:
Multimodal AI can work with more than one type of input or output, such as text, images, PDFs, audio, video, tables, or screenshots.

This enables use cases like asking questions about a chart, summarizing a scanned document, analyzing an image, or combining speech transcription with text generation.

In product work, the main value is knowing what this capability can support and where it can fail. PMs should connect the concept to real use cases, data availability, evaluation criteria, and user expectations instead of treating it as a generic AI label.

pm_notes.zh:
多模態專案要額外評估 OCR/ASR 品質、檔案格式、個資遮罩、權限控管與錯誤辨識風險。

可採取行動：UAT（使用者驗收測試）時加入低品質掃描檔、複雜表格、圖片文字、錄音雜訊與敏感資訊遮罩等測試案例。
pm_notes.en:
PMs should check which modalities are truly supported in production. File format, image quality, OCR accuracy, privacy, and latency can all affect the user experience.

Use it to clarify scope: what the system should do, what it should not do, and how success will be measured.

primary_sources.title: IBM Think - What is multimodal AI?
Google Cloud - Multimodal AI

entry_metadata.change_note: 發布前中文內容可讀性修正

summary.zh: Voice Agent 是能透過語音和使用者即時互動，並結合模型、工具與語音技術完成任務的 AI agent。
summary.en: A core concept for understanding AI model capabilities and GenAI product behavior.

explanation.zh:
Voice Agent 是能透過語音和使用者即時互動的 AI agent，通常結合 speech-to-text、LLM、tool use、text-to-speech 或 speech-to-speech 模型。它不只是把 chatbot 加上語音，而是需要處理即時對話、打斷、語氣、延遲、背景噪音、身份驗證與多輪任務。

Voice Agent 常見於語音助理、客服、預約、內部操作輔助、現場作業支援等場景。因為它通常是即時互動，TTFT、整體延遲、錯誤恢復與轉人工設計會直接影響使用者體驗。
explanation.en:
A voice agent is an AI system that interacts through spoken conversation. It usually combines speech recognition, language understanding, tool use, response generation, and text-to-speech.

Voice agents are sensitive to latency because users expect near-real-time turn-taking.

In product work, the main value is knowing what this capability can support and where it can fail. PMs should connect the concept to real use cases, data availability, evaluation criteria, and user expectations instead of treating it as a generic AI label.

pm_notes.zh:
Voice Agent 的體驗門檻比文字聊天更高，因為延遲、聽錯、語氣不自然或無法打斷都會讓使用者很快失去信任。

可採取行動：驗收時同時測試語音辨識準確率、回應延遲、打斷處理、轉人工、噪音環境與敏感資訊處理，而不只測試回答內容。
pm_notes.en:
PMs should test voice agents in realistic environments, including accents, background noise, interruptions, and escalation paths. Voice UX quality depends on both model behavior and audio pipeline performance.

Use it to clarify scope: what the system should do, what it should not do, and how success will be measured.

primary_sources.title: Deepgram - What exactly is an AI voice agent?
OpenAI API - Voice agents guide

summary.zh: Agent Skills 是把特定任務所需的指令、腳本與資源包成可重複使用的能力模組。
summary.en: A concept related to how applications instruct models, call tools, or structure model interactions.

explanation.zh:
Agent Skills 是把特定任務所需的 instructions（指令）、scripts（腳本）、resources（資源）與工作流程包成可重複使用的技能模組，讓 AI agent 在執行特定任務時能一致地遵循既定流程，而不是每次只靠使用者臨場描述。

簡單理解：prompt 比較像一次性的指令；Agent Skills 則更像可安裝、可版本管理的工作 SOP。它可以包含任務說明、範本、程式腳本、檢查規則、資料格式與輸出要求，讓 agent 在文件處理、資料分析、簡報產出、程式碼維護等場景中更穩定。
explanation.en:
Agent Skills are modular packages that give an AI agent task-specific capabilities. A skill may include instructions, metadata, examples, scripts, templates, or other resources that help the agent perform a repeatable workflow.

The goal is to avoid putting every behavior into one long system prompt. Instead, teams can package domain-specific or workflow-specific know-how into reusable skills that the agent can load when needed.

Skills can make agents easier to extend and maintain, but they also introduce governance questions: who owns each skill, how it is tested, and how version changes are controlled.

pm_notes.zh:
Agent Skills 會把 prompt、腳本與資源包成可重複使用的能力，因此需要像產品功能或內部工具一樣管理版本、權限與適用範圍。

可採取行動：如果團隊要建立 Skills，PM 應確認每個 skill 的負責人、適用任務、輸入/輸出格式、可使用工具、版本紀錄與測試案例。
pm_notes.en: PMs should treat skills as product capabilities, not just prompt snippets. Important skills should have clear owners, test cases, version history, and usage boundaries so the agent does not apply the wrong procedure in the wrong context. Before launch, confirm ownership, test coverage, and failure handling for workflows that rely on this behavior.

primary_sources.title: Claude API Docs - Agent Skills
Anthropic Engineering - Equipping agents with Agent Skills

name.zh: 電腦操作能力 / Computer Use

summary.zh: Computer Use 是讓 AI agent 透過螢幕截圖、滑鼠、鍵盤或 UI 操作來使用軟體的能力。
summary.en: A concept related to how applications instruct models, call tools, or structure model interactions.

explanation.zh:
Computer Use 是讓 AI agent 透過螢幕截圖、滑鼠、鍵盤或 UI 操作來使用軟體的能力。不同於一般 API tool calling，Computer Use 讓模型可以像人一樣觀察介面、點擊按鈕、輸入文字、讀取畫面並完成跨系統任務。

它適合用在沒有 API、API 不完整、或需要操作既有內部後台與桌面軟體的場景。但因為 agent 能操作介面，錯誤點擊、資料外洩、權限越界與不可預期操作的風險也更高。
explanation.en:
Computer use allows an AI agent to interact with a graphical user interface, such as clicking buttons, typing into fields, reading screens, or navigating applications.

It can automate tasks in software that does not have a clean API, but it is more fragile than direct system integration because UI layouts can change.

In a production application, this affects the contract between user intent, model instructions, connected tools, and the final user experience. It should be designed, tested, and versioned when it influences important workflows.

pm_notes.zh:
Computer Use 很適合自動化 legacy 系統或跨工具流程，但比一般問答型 AI 風險更高，必須明確定義可操作範圍與人工確認點。

可採取行動：上線前確認是否有沙箱環境、操作權限、螢幕/行為日誌、敏感操作阻擋、失敗復原與人工確認流程。
pm_notes.en:
PMs should use computer use only where it adds real value over APIs or workflow integration. Test permissions, failure recovery, audit logs, and human approval for sensitive actions.

Before launch, confirm ownership, test coverage, and failure handling for any prompt, tool, or interaction pattern that affects users.

primary_sources.title: OpenAI API - Computer use
Claude API Docs - Computer use tool

summary.zh: Context Engineering 是設計、組裝、維護模型在推論時應該看到哪些資訊的工程方法。
summary.en: A concept related to how applications instruct models, call tools, or structure model interactions.

explanation.zh:
Context Engineering 是設計、組裝、維護模型在推論時應該看到哪些資訊的工程方法。它不只包含 prompt，也包含歷史對話、RAG 檢索內容、工具結果、使用者狀態、任務進度、記憶、系統規則與可用工具描述。

它和 Prompt Engineering 的差異在於：Prompt Engineering 主要關注「怎麼下指令」；Context Engineering 關注「在什麼時候，把哪些資訊，用什麼格式送進模型」。對多步驟 agent 來說，上下文過多會增加成本並降低穩定性；上下文不足則可能讓 agent 做錯事或反覆詢問。
explanation.en:
Context engineering is the practice of designing what information a model receives at the right time. It includes system instructions, user input, conversation history, retrieved documents, tool outputs, memory, user state, and formatting.

The goal is to give the model enough relevant context to perform well without overloading the context window, increasing cost unnecessarily, or distracting the model with irrelevant information.

Good context engineering is especially important in RAG and agent systems because the model’s answer depends heavily on what context is assembled before generation.

pm_notes.zh:
Context Engineering 會直接影響 agent 的可靠性、成本與回應品質。PM 不需要決定每個技術細節，但需要知道「塞更多資料」不一定更好。

可採取行動：在 PoC 或 UAT（使用者驗收測試）時，與技術團隊確認模型輸入包含哪些上下文來源、哪些資訊會被裁切、哪些資訊需要可追溯來源，以及 token 使用量是否可控。
pm_notes.en: PMs should review what context is included for key workflows, especially when answers depend on retrieved documents or tool outputs. Too little context causes weak answers; too much context can increase cost, latency, and confusion. Before launch, confirm ownership, test coverage, and failure handling for workflows that rely on this behavior.

primary_sources.title: Anthropic Engineering - Effective context engineering for AI agents
LangChain Docs - Context engineering in agents

summary.zh: Context window 是模型一次能讀取與參考的內容長度，包含提示詞、對話、文件與輸出。
summary.en: A concept related to how applications instruct models, call tools, or structure model interactions.

explanation.zh:
Context window 是模型一次能讀取與參考的內容長度，包括 system prompt（系統提示詞）、使用者問題、歷史對話、RAG（檢索增強生成）檢索文件、工具回傳結果與模型輸出。

技術原理：模型只能根據目前上下文視窗中的內容生成回答。超出視窗的資料無法直接被參考。即使某些模型支援很長 context，也不代表應把所有文件都放進去。
explanation.en:
The context window is the amount of information a model can consider in one request. It includes system instructions, user input, conversation history, retrieved content, tool results, and the model’s output.

A larger context window can support longer tasks, but it does not automatically improve quality. Irrelevant context can still distract the model.

In a production application, this affects the contract between user intent, model instructions, connected tools, and the final user experience. It should be designed, tested, and versioned when it influences important workflows.

pm_notes.zh:
放太多內容會增加成本、拉長 latency，重要資訊也可能被稀釋。RAG系統的重點不是塞入所有資料，而是精準找出最相關且可信的內容。

可採取行動：與技術團隊確認主要場景的 context 組成與 token預算，釐清哪些內容必須放入上下文、哪些應由 RAG 精準檢索。
pm_notes.en:
PMs should ask what information is placed into context for each use case and whether it fits within the token budget. RAG should retrieve relevant context, not simply include everything.

Before launch, confirm ownership, test coverage, and failure handling for any prompt, tool, or interaction pattern that affects users.

primary_sources.title: OpenAI API - Models
IBM Think - What is a context window?

name.zh: 函式呼叫 / 工具呼叫

summary.zh: Function calling 或 tool use 是讓模型不只生成文字，還能呼叫外部工具、API（應用程式介面）或系統完成任務的能力。
summary.en: A concept related to how applications instruct models, call tools, or structure model interactions.

explanation.zh:
Function calling 或 tool use 是讓模型不只生成文字，還能呼叫外部工具、API（應用程式介面）或系統完成任務的能力。

運作方式：使用者提出需求後，模型判斷是否需要工具，產生結構化參數，系統呼叫外部服務，例如查詢資料庫、搜尋文件、建立行事曆、寄送草稿，再由模型根據工具結果回覆使用者。
explanation.en:
Function calling lets a model produce structured arguments for an external function or tool. The application executes the tool, then returns the result to the model or user.

This is how LLM applications can look up data, retrieve records, create tickets, send messages, update systems, or trigger workflow actions. The model decides what function to request, but the application should control permissions and execution.

Function calling turns a language model from a text generator into part of a workflow system, so reliability depends on schemas, validation, error handling, and audit logs.

pm_notes.zh:
工具呼叫讓 AI 更實用，但也增加操作風險。凡是涉及查詢敏感資料、寫入系統、寄信、下單或更改狀態的動作，都需要權限控管、人工確認、審計紀錄與錯誤處理。

可採取行動：列出 AI 可呼叫的工具清單、每個工具的權限、輸入欄位、審計紀錄與高風險操作確認機制。
pm_notes.en: PMs should define which tools the model can call, what each tool is allowed to do, and which actions require confirmation. High-impact actions should have permission checks, logging, and clear failure handling. Before launch, confirm ownership, test coverage, and failure handling for any prompt, tool, or interaction pattern that affects users.

primary_sources.title: OpenAI API - Structured model outputs
OpenAI Agents SDK - Agents

summary.zh: Model Context Protocol（MCP）是一個開放標準，用來讓 AI 應用以一致方式連接外部資料來源、工具與工作流程。
summary.en: A concept related to how applications instruct models, call tools, or structure model interactions.

explanation.zh:
Model Context Protocol（MCP）是一個開放標準，用來讓 AI 應用以一致方式連接外部資料來源、工具與工作流程。它的目標是降低每個 AI 應用都要客製整合資料庫、文件庫、搜尋工具或內部系統的成本。

簡單理解：MCP 像是 AI 應用和外部系統之間的標準連接介面。MCP server 提供資料或工具，MCP client 讓 AI 應用存取這些能力。它常用於 IDE、內部知識助理、agent 平台與企業資料整合場景。
explanation.en:
Model Context Protocol, or MCP, is an open standard for connecting AI applications to external tools, data sources, and systems in a consistent way.

It helps separate the model experience from the implementation details of each connector, which can make tool and data integrations easier to manage.

In a production application, this affects the contract between user intent, model instructions, connected tools, and the final user experience. It should be designed, tested, and versioned when it influences important workflows.

pm_notes.zh:
MCP 可以提升整合速度與可擴充性，但也會把資料存取、工具呼叫與權限管理變成重要風險點。

可採取行動：導入 MCP 前，PM 應確認每個 MCP server 可提供哪些資料/工具、權限如何控管、是否有審計紀錄，以及是否允許 agent 執行會改變系統狀態的操作。
pm_notes.en:
PMs should evaluate MCP connectors as part of the product’s permission and data-access model. A connector is not just a feature; it changes what the AI can see and do.

Before launch, confirm ownership, test coverage, and failure handling for any prompt, tool, or interaction pattern that affects users.

primary_sources.title: Model Context Protocol - What is MCP?
Anthropic - Introducing the Model Context Protocol

summary.zh: Prompt 是使用者或系統提供給模型的指令、問題與背景資訊，會直接影響模型輸出品質。
summary.en: The instruction, question, or context provided to a model to guide its output.

explanation.zh:
Prompt 是使用者或系統提供給模型的指令、問題與背景資訊，會直接影響模型輸出品質。

一個完整 prompt 通常包含：任務目標、角色設定、必要背景、輸出格式、限制條件、範例與禁止事項。例如「你是產品支援助理，請根據以下服務規則，用 200 字內回覆使用者問題，語氣專業且易懂」。
explanation.en:
A prompt is the instruction, question, context, or example given to a model to guide its response. Prompts may include a role, task, constraints, examples, source material, output format, and refusal rules.

In a production system, prompts are not casual text. They shape product behavior, output quality, tone, safety, and consistency. Small wording changes can affect how the model interprets the task.

Prompts work best when they are tested with representative inputs rather than only a few successful demo examples.

pm_notes.zh:
Prompt 不是魔法咒語。好的 prompt可以改善穩定性與格式，但若資料來源錯誤、需求不清楚、模型能力不足或缺乏評估流程，單靠 prompt 無法解決根本問題。

可採取行動：為核心 prompt 建立 owner、版本紀錄與基本測試題，避免修改後無法回溯品質變化。
pm_notes.en: PMs should make sure important prompts have a clear owner, version history, and test cases. Prompt changes can affect answer quality, tone, safety, and output format, so they should be reviewed like product configuration. Before launch, confirm ownership, test coverage, and failure handling for any prompt, tool, or interaction pattern that affects users.

primary_sources.title: OpenAI API - Prompt engineering
Microsoft Learn - Prompt engineering techniques

entry_metadata.change_note: 發布前中文內容可讀性修正

summary.zh: 提示工程是設計、測試與優化 prompt（提示詞）的方法，目標是讓模型輸出更穩定、更正確、更符合業務需求。
summary.en: A concept related to how applications instruct models, call tools, or structure model interactions.

explanation.zh:
提示工程是設計、測試與優化 prompt（提示詞）的方法，目標是讓模型輸出更穩定、更正確、更符合業務需求。

常見技巧包含：明確指定角色與任務、補充上下文資料、指定輸出格式、加入 few-shot 範例、說明不可做的事、將複雜任務拆成步驟、要求引用來源或無資料時回答不知道。
explanation.en:
Prompt engineering is the process of designing and testing prompts so a model produces more useful, consistent, and controllable outputs.

It may involve clearer instructions, examples, step breakdowns, output schemas, grounding rules, refusal instructions, or constraints on length and tone. It is often the fastest way to improve a GenAI prototype.

However, prompt engineering cannot fix every issue. If the data is wrong, the retrieval system is weak, or the task is outside the model’s capability, prompt changes alone will not make the product reliable.

pm_notes.zh:
正式上線的 prompt應納入版本管理、測試、審核與回歸驗證。小幅修改 prompt 也可能改變回答品質，因此不宜由開發者臨時手動調整後直接上線。

可採取行動：每次調整 prompt 後都應跑核心測試題，並記錄變更原因、效果差異與是否可回滾。
pm_notes.en: PMs should treat prompt changes as product changes. For important workflows, validate prompts with representative test cases and track whether changes improve accuracy, consistency, safety, and usability. Before launch, confirm ownership, test coverage, and failure handling for any prompt, tool, or interaction pattern that affects users.

primary_sources.title: OpenAI API - Prompt engineering
Microsoft Learn - Prompt engineering techniques

summary.zh: 可重複使用的 prompt（提示詞）格式，將固定規則與變動欄位分離，例如 {customer_question}、{tone}、{source_text}。
summary.en: A concept related to how applications instruct models, call tools, or structure model interactions.

explanation.zh:
Prompt Template 是可重複使用的 prompt（提示詞）格式，將固定規則與變動欄位分離，例如 `{customer_question}`、`{tone}`、`{source_text}`。

範本化可以讓不同情境共用一致的任務說明、輸出格式與安全規則，同時保留必要的可變內容。對正式產品來說，prompt template 應像產品設定一樣被管理，包含欄位定義、預設值、適用場景、測試案例與版本紀錄。
explanation.en:
A prompt template is a reusable prompt structure with placeholders for variable content, such as user input, retrieved context, tone, format, or task type.

Templates help standardize behavior across repeated workflows and make prompts easier to maintain.

In a production application, this affects the contract between user intent, model instructions, connected tools, and the final user experience. It should be designed, tested, and versioned when it influences important workflows.

pm_notes.zh:
範本化可提升一致性，也便於 A/B testing、版本管理與成本估算。

可採取行動：將可變欄位、必填資料、輸出格式與錯誤處理規則寫進 template 規格，避免不同開發者實作不一致。
pm_notes.en:
PMs should confirm which fields are variable and which instructions are fixed. Poor templates can cause inconsistent outputs or hidden assumptions across use cases.

Before launch, confirm ownership, test coverage, and failure handling for any prompt, tool, or interaction pattern that affects users.

primary_sources.title: OpenAI API - Prompt engineering
Microsoft Learn - Prompt engineering techniques

entry_metadata.change_note: 發布前中文內容可讀性修正

summary.zh: 記錄 prompt（提示詞）的版本、修改原因、測試結果與上線時間。
summary.en: A concept related to how applications instruct models, call tools, or structure model interactions.

explanation.zh:
Prompt Versioning 是記錄 prompt（提示詞）的版本、修改原因、測試結果與上線時間。因為小幅文字調整也可能改變模型回答品質、格式、語氣或安全邊界，正式服務不應只靠人工記憶管理 prompt。

好的版本管理會讓團隊知道目前正式環境使用哪個 prompt、何時修改、修改後通過哪些測試，以及如果品質下降時可以回滾到哪個版本。它也能協助 PM 對齊 UAT、A/B testing 與事故追蹤。
explanation.en:
Prompt versioning is the practice of tracking prompt changes over time. It records what changed, when it changed, and which version is used in each environment.

This matters because small wording changes can change model behavior, output format, or safety performance.

In a production application, this affects the contract between user intent, model instructions, connected tools, and the final user experience. It should be designed, tested, and versioned when it influences important workflows.

pm_notes.zh:
PM 要把 prompt當作產品設定或規則資產管理；出問題時要能回滾與追溯。

可採取行動：建立 prompt 版本命名與發版紀錄，讓 UAT（使用者驗收測試）、正式環境與回滾版本可以對應。
pm_notes.en:
PMs should require version history for production prompts. Before changing a prompt, run regression tests, meaning reusing existing test cases to confirm the change did not break prior behavior.

Before launch, confirm ownership, test coverage, and failure handling for any prompt, tool, or interaction pattern that affects users.

primary_sources.title: OpenAI API - Prompt engineering

summary.zh: Streaming 是模型邊生成邊回傳內容，而不是等整段答案完成後一次顯示。
summary.en: A concept related to how applications instruct models, call tools, or structure model interactions.

explanation.zh:
Streaming 是模型邊生成邊回傳內容，而不是等整段答案完成後一次顯示。

優點：使用者更快看到回應、互動體驗更好、可降低等待焦慮。對聊天介面尤其重要，因為 TTFT（首個 token 回應時間）低會讓使用者感覺系統有在運作。
explanation.en:
Streaming returns model output incrementally as it is generated, rather than waiting for the full response to finish.

For chat experiences, streaming can make the product feel faster because users see the first words sooner, even if the total completion time is similar.

In a production application, this affects the contract between user intent, model instructions, connected tools, and the final user experience. It should be designed, tested, and versioned when it influences important workflows.

pm_notes.zh:
Streaming 改善感受上的速度，但不一定縮短完整生成時間。若下游系統需要完整 JSON 或完整文件才能處理，仍需等 TTLT。

可採取行動：若是聊天體驗，要求同時量測 TTFT與 TTLT，確認 streaming改善的是感知速度還是完整完成時間。
pm_notes.en:
PMs should track both perceived speed and full completion time. Streaming improves interaction feel, but it does not replace latency optimization.

Before launch, confirm ownership, test coverage, and failure handling for any prompt, tool, or interaction pattern that affects users.

summary.zh: Structured output 是要求模型依照固定格式輸出，例如 JSON、表格或指定欄位。
summary.en: A concept related to how applications instruct models, call tools, or structure model interactions.

explanation.zh:
Structured output 是要求模型依照固定格式輸出，例如 JSON、表格或指定欄位。它讓模型輸出可以被後續系統解析與自動處理，而不是只有自然語言文字。

常見用途：從信件抽取客戶姓名、產品名稱、需求類型與急迫程度；從會議紀錄產生 action items；把非結構化文件轉成欄位資料。
explanation.en:
Structured output means asking the model to return data in a defined format, such as JSON, a fixed schema, or a table.

It is important when another system needs to parse the model response reliably instead of reading free-form text.

In a production application, this affects the contract between user intent, model instructions, connected tools, and the final user experience. It should be designed, tested, and versioned when it influences important workflows.

pm_notes.zh:
只要 AI 輸出會進入系統流程，就應重視格式穩定性。需要測試漏欄位、格式錯誤、型別錯誤、無法解析、模型自行新增欄位等情況。

可採取行動：用真實案例測試 JSON/schema 是否穩定，並要求系統能處理漏欄位、型別錯誤與解析失敗。
pm_notes.en:
PMs should specify the required fields, validation rules, and failure behavior. For automated workflows, malformed output should be handled as a product error, not a user problem.

Before launch, confirm ownership, test coverage, and failure handling for any prompt, tool, or interaction pattern that affects users.

summary.zh: System prompt（系統提示詞）是模型背後的高層級指令，通常由系統或開發者設定，使用者不一定看得到。
summary.en: A higher-priority instruction that defines the model’s role, behavior, constraints, and response style.

explanation.zh:
System prompt（系統提示詞）是模型背後的高層級指令，通常由系統或開發者設定，使用者不一定看得到。它定義 AI 的角色、行為邊界、回答風格與安全限制。

技術概念：模型生成回答時會同時參考 system prompt（系統提示詞）、user message、歷史對話與外部資料。System prompt 通常用於建立優先規則，例如「只能根據提供文件回答，文件沒有答案時請說無法判斷」。
explanation.en:
A system prompt is a high-priority instruction that defines the model’s role, constraints, tone, and expected behavior. It is usually written by the application team rather than the end user.

System prompts can tell the model what sources to use, what it should refuse, how it should format answers, and how it should behave in sensitive situations. They are useful, but they are not a complete security control by themselves.

In production, system prompts should be managed with versioning, testing, and review because they influence the behavior of the whole AI feature.

pm_notes.zh:
System prompt是 GenAI 應用的重要資產，會影響安全性、準確性與品牌語氣，應納入審核、測試與變更管理。

可採取行動：將 system prompt納入變更管理；每次修改後應執行回歸測試，也就是用既有測試題重新確認安全規則、拒答規則與回答格式沒有被改壞。
pm_notes.en: PMs should review system prompts for scope, tone, grounding rules, and risk controls. After changes, run regression tests, meaning existing test cases are reused to check that expected behavior still works. Before launch, confirm ownership, test coverage, and failure handling for any prompt, tool, or interaction pattern that affects users.

summary.zh: Chunking 是將長文件切成較小段落的過程，常用於 RAG（檢索增強生成）。
summary.en: The process of splitting long documents into smaller pieces for search, retrieval, or model input.

explanation.zh:
Chunking 是將長文件切成較小段落的過程，常用於 RAG（檢索增強生成）。模型與向量資料庫通常不直接處理整份長文件，而是處理一段一段的內容。

為什麼重要：切太短，段落可能失去上下文；切太長，檢索不精準、token（語詞單位）成本上升，模型也可能抓不到重點。常見切法包括固定字數、依標題段落、依語意完整性切分，以及加入重疊區段避免上下文斷裂。
explanation.en:
Chunking is the process of splitting long documents into smaller passages that can be indexed, retrieved, and passed into a model.

Chunk size affects both answer quality and cost. Chunks that are too small may lose important context, while chunks that are too large may dilute relevance and consume more tokens.

Good chunking often follows document structure, such as headings, sections, FAQs, or policy clauses, rather than only fixed character counts.

pm_notes.zh:
PM 要把 chunking當成 RAG核心設計項，不是純工程細節；需用真實問題驗證切片策略；Chunking 策略會直接影響 RAG 回答品質，是 GenAI 專案常被低估的技術細節。

可採取行動：用實際問題比較不同 chunk（文件片段） size、重疊比例與切分方式，並檢查引用片段是否保留完整上下文。
pm_notes.en: PMs should ask how chunking was tested with real user questions. In RAG systems, chunking directly affects retrieval quality, source traceability, latency, and token cost. Validate it with real data and real user questions, not only synthetic examples or technical demos.

summary.zh: Data catalog 是管理企業資料資產的目錄，協助使用者找到資料來源、owner、欄位定義、權限、品質狀態與資料血緣。
summary.en: A concept related to data preparation, retrieval, knowledge grounding, or document understanding in GenAI systems.

explanation.zh:
Data catalog 是管理企業資料資產的目錄，協助使用者找到資料來源、owner、欄位定義、權限、品質狀態與資料血緣。

若沒有 data catalog，GenAI 團隊容易花大量時間找資料、確認版本與釐清責任歸屬。
explanation.en:
A data catalog is an inventory of data assets, including descriptions, owners, lineage, quality indicators, and access rules.

For AI projects, it helps teams find usable data sources and understand whether those sources are trustworthy and allowed for the use case.

In retrieval and data workflows, the practical quality depends on source freshness, structure, access permissions, metadata, and how the content is prepared before the model uses it. Weak data preparation often appears later as weak model quality.

pm_notes.zh: 當 AI 專案需要找可用資料來源時，data catalog 可協助確認資料在哪裡、由誰負責、是否可用、是否含敏感資料與是否有授權限制。
pm_notes.en:
PMs should use a data catalog to identify data owners, access constraints, and source reliability before committing to an AI use case.

Validate it with real data and real user questions, not only synthetic examples or technical demos.

summary.zh: Data lake 是用來儲存大量原始或半結構化資料的環境，可以包含文字、log、文件、音訊、影像與系統事件資料。
summary.en: A concept related to data preparation, retrieval, knowledge grounding, or document understanding in GenAI systems.

explanation.zh:
Data lake 是用來儲存大量原始或半結構化資料的環境，可以包含文字、log、文件、音訊、影像與系統事件資料。

在 GenAI 專案中，Data lake 常是資料來源之一，不代表資料已可直接被模型使用，仍需清理、遮罩、轉換與品質檢查。
explanation.en:
A data lake stores large volumes of raw or semi-structured data in a flexible format. It can include logs, documents, events, images, audio, or structured tables.

AI teams may use data lakes as upstream sources for analytics, training, retrieval, or document processing pipelines.

In retrieval and data workflows, the practical quality depends on source freshness, structure, access permissions, metadata, and how the content is prepared before the model uses it. Weak data preparation often appears later as weak model quality.

pm_notes.zh: Data lake 偏向保存原始資料與彈性探索，適合支援後續分析、特徵工程、RAG文件處理或訓練資料準備。但原始資料通常包含敏感內容，因此權限、分區、metadata 與保留政策很重要。
pm_notes.en:
PMs should confirm whether data in the lake is curated enough for the use case. Raw data often needs cleaning, governance, and access control before it can support AI features.

Validate it with real data and real user questions, not only synthetic examples or technical demos.

summary.zh: Data lineage 是追蹤資料從哪裡來、經過哪些轉換、最後流向哪裡的能力。
summary.en: A concept related to data preparation, retrieval, knowledge grounding, or document understanding in GenAI systems.

explanation.zh:
Data lineage 是追蹤資料從哪裡來、經過哪些轉換、最後流向哪裡的能力。

在 GenAI 中，lineage 可涵蓋原始文件、chunk（文件片段）、embedding（向量嵌入）、索引版本、檢索結果與最終回答。
explanation.en:
Data lineage tracks where data comes from, how it changes, and where it is used. It shows the path from original source to downstream outputs.

For AI systems, lineage helps explain why a model or RAG system produced a result and where to investigate errors.

In retrieval and data workflows, the practical quality depends on source freshness, structure, access permissions, metadata, and how the content is prepared before the model uses it. Weak data preparation often appears later as weak model quality.

pm_notes.zh:
對需要合規、稽核或正式營運的場景很重要。當 AI 回答錯誤時，需要追溯資料來源、處理流程、版本與負責單位，才能定位問題並修正。

可採取行動：要求關鍵資料流程保留來源、處理步驟、版本與更新時間，讓錯誤回答能追溯到資料源。
pm_notes.en:
PMs should ask for lineage when AI outputs depend on multiple upstream systems. It is especially useful for debugging, auditability, and source quality issues.

Validate it with real data and real user questions, not only synthetic examples or technical demos.

summary.zh: Data pipeline 是資料從來源到目標系統的一連串處理流程。
summary.en: A concept related to data preparation, retrieval, knowledge grounding, or document understanding in GenAI systems.

explanation.zh:
Data pipeline 是資料從來源到目標系統的一連串處理流程。

GenAI 範例：文件來源同步、文字解析、資料清理、敏感資訊遮罩、chunking（文件切片）、embedding（向量嵌入）、寫入 vector DB（向量資料庫）、建立索引、提供 RAG（檢索增強生成）查詢。
explanation.en:
A data pipeline moves data from sources through processing steps into a destination system. Steps may include extraction, cleaning, transformation, validation, indexing, and loading.

In GenAI systems, pipelines often prepare documents for RAG or generate embeddings for search.

In retrieval and data workflows, the practical quality depends on source freshness, structure, access permissions, metadata, and how the content is prepared before the model uses it. Weak data preparation often appears later as weak model quality.

pm_notes.zh:
資料管線不是一次性工作，需要處理排程、錯誤重跑、資料品質檢查、權限同步、版本更新、監控與告警。

可採取行動：為知識庫更新流程定義排程、失敗重跑、資料品質檢查、權限同步與告警機制。
pm_notes.en:
PMs should define pipeline freshness requirements and failure handling. A RAG system can only be as current and reliable as the pipeline that feeds it.

Validate it with real data and real user questions, not only synthetic examples or technical demos.

summary.zh: Data quality 衡量資料是否正確、完整、一致、及時、可用與可追溯。
summary.en: A concept related to data preparation, retrieval, knowledge grounding, or document understanding in GenAI systems.

explanation.zh:
Data quality 衡量資料是否正確、完整、一致、及時、可用與可追溯。

GenAI 專案重點：知識庫資料若過期、重複、格式錯誤、互相矛盾或權限不清，模型回答品質會受到很大影響。
explanation.en:
Data quality describes whether data is accurate, complete, consistent, timely, and fit for use.

Poor data quality can lead to weak retrieval, misleading analytics, unreliable model behavior, or incorrect generated answers.

In retrieval and data workflows, the practical quality depends on source freshness, structure, access permissions, metadata, and how the content is prepared before the model uses it. Weak data preparation often appears later as weak model quality.

pm_notes.zh:
導入 GenAI 前應盤點資料品質與資料責任人。資料品質問題若不處理，後續靠 prompt或模型通常難以補救。

可採取行動：在 PoC（概念驗證）前先盤點資料正確性、完整性、版本衝突與過期文件，並指定資料 owner。
pm_notes.en:
PMs should define minimum data-quality checks for important AI workflows. Data issues often appear as model-quality problems later.

Validate it with real data and real user questions, not only synthetic examples or technical demos.

summary.en: A concept related to data preparation, retrieval, knowledge grounding, or document understanding in GenAI systems.

explanation.zh:
Data warehouse 是整理過、結構化且適合分析查詢的資料平台，常用於 BI、報表、指標分析與決策支援。

在 GenAI 專案中，data warehouse 常用來分析使用者行為、成本、任務完成率、錯誤率與業務 KPI。
explanation.en:
A data warehouse stores structured, curated data optimized for reporting and analysis. It usually contains cleaned data organized for business queries.

AI products may use warehouse data for analytics, personalization, evaluation, or structured tool responses.

In retrieval and data workflows, the practical quality depends on source freshness, structure, access permissions, metadata, and how the content is prepared before the model uses it. Weak data preparation often appears later as weak model quality.

pm_notes.zh: Data warehouse 的資料通常比 data lake 更乾淨、更有結構，適合提供營運指標、使用量分析、成效追蹤與模型監控資料。但它不一定適合直接存放非結構化文件。
pm_notes.en:
PMs should verify whether warehouse data is current, governed, and suitable for the product workflow before using it in AI features.

summary.zh: ELT 是 Extract、Load、Transform，代表先擷取資料並載入資料平台，再進行轉換。
summary.en: A concept related to data preparation, retrieval, knowledge grounding, or document understanding in GenAI systems.

explanation.zh:
ELT 是 Extract、Load、Transform，代表先擷取資料並載入資料平台，再進行轉換。它在雲端資料倉儲與資料湖架構中很常見。

與 ETL 差異：ETL 是先轉換再載入；ELT 是先載入再轉換。ELT 通常讓原始資料先被保存，後續再依不同需求轉換。
explanation.en:
ELT stands for extract, load, transform. Data is first loaded into a destination platform, then transformed there.

This pattern is common in modern cloud data stacks where storage and compute are scalable.

In retrieval and data workflows, the practical quality depends on source freshness, structure, access permissions, metadata, and how the content is prepared before the model uses it. Weak data preparation often appears later as weak model quality.

pm_notes.zh: 若 GenAI 專案需要多種下游用途，例如分析、RAG、訓練資料準備，ELT 可保留較多彈性，但也需要治理原始資料的權限與隱私。
pm_notes.en:
PMs should know whether transformations happen before or after loading because it affects freshness, observability, and where data-quality checks should run.

Validate it with real data and real user questions, not only synthetic examples or technical demos.

summary.zh: Embedding 是把文字、圖片或其他資料轉換成數字向量的技術。
summary.en: A numeric representation of text, images, or other content used to compare semantic similarity.

explanation.zh:
Embedding 是把文字、圖片或其他資料轉換成數字向量的技術。這些向量代表語意，因此可以用來比較相似度、做語意搜尋、RAG 檢索與推薦。

簡單理解：embedding model 會把內容轉成向量座標，語意相近的文字在向量空間中通常距離較近，例如「產品費用」與「費用減免」可能比「登入錯誤」更接近。但相似不等於一定正確，正式 RAG 仍需要搭配檢索評估、metadata filter 與權限控管。
explanation.en:
An embedding is a numeric representation of text, images, or other content. Items with similar meaning are placed closer together in the embedding space.

Embeddings power semantic search, recommendations, clustering, deduplication, and many RAG retrieval workflows. In a RAG system, documents and user questions are converted into embeddings so the system can find semantically related content.

Embedding quality depends on the embedding model, language coverage, domain terminology, product names, internal abbreviations, and how documents are chunked.

pm_notes.zh:
Embedding 模型會影響搜尋品質。中文、英文、專業術語、產品名稱與內部縮寫都可能影響向量效果，因此需要用真實問題測試檢索品質。

可採取行動：用真實業務問題測試 embedding 搜尋效果，特別檢查中文、縮寫、產品名稱與內部用語，並確認相似結果是否真的能支持正確回答。
pm_notes.en: PMs should test embeddings with real user language, professional terms, product names, and internal abbreviations. If search results are semantically close but not useful, consider keyword search, metadata filters, or reranking. Validate it with real data and real user questions, not only synthetic examples or technical demos.

summary.zh: ETL 是 Extract、Transform、Load，代表資料擷取、轉換與載入。
summary.en: A concept related to data preparation, retrieval, knowledge grounding, or document understanding in GenAI systems.

explanation.zh:
ETL 是 Extract、Transform、Load，代表資料擷取、轉換與載入。它是資料工程常見流程，也是 GenAI 專案常被低估的工作量。

在 GenAI 中的應用：從 SharePoint、資料庫、PDF、客服紀錄抽取資料；清理格式、移除雜訊、遮罩敏感資訊；載入知識庫、資料湖或向量資料庫。
explanation.en:
ETL stands for extract, transform, load. Data is pulled from source systems, cleaned or transformed, and then loaded into a target system.

For GenAI, ETL may prepare documents, remove sensitive data, normalize formats, or load content into a knowledge base.

In retrieval and data workflows, the practical quality depends on source freshness, structure, access permissions, metadata, and how the content is prepared before the model uses it. Weak data preparation often appears later as weak model quality.

pm_notes.zh:
模型效果不好，有時不是模型差，而是資料前處理不好。ETL 需考慮資料來源、排程、錯誤重跑、品質檢查與權限。

可採取行動：把資料抽取、清理、遮罩、格式轉換與載入向量庫列入專案時程，不要只估模型開發工期。
pm_notes.en:
PMs should not underestimate ETL effort. Many AI projects fail because source data is messy, outdated, duplicated, or hard to access.

Validate it with real data and real user questions, not only synthetic examples or technical demos.

summary.zh: Feature store 是集中管理機器學習特徵的系統，確保訓練與線上推論使用一致的特徵。
summary.en: A concept related to data preparation, retrieval, knowledge grounding, or document understanding in GenAI systems.

explanation.zh:
Feature store 是集中管理機器學習特徵的系統，確保訓練與線上推論使用一致的特徵。

重點是避免 training-serving skew，也就是訓練時用的特徵與線上推論時用的特徵不一致。
explanation.en:
A feature store manages reusable machine learning features, such as user attributes, event aggregates, or product signals.

It helps teams keep training and production features consistent across models and applications.

In retrieval and data workflows, the practical quality depends on source freshness, structure, access permissions, metadata, and how the content is prepared before the model uses it. Weak data preparation often appears later as weak model quality.

pm_notes.zh: Feature store 在傳統 ML 專案中較常見，例如風險模型、推薦模型或預測模型。GenAI 專案若與預測模型、個人化推薦或決策模型結合，也可能需要 feature store。
pm_notes.en:
PMs should consider feature stores when a GenAI product depends on traditional ML models, ranking, personalization, or predictions.

Validate it with real data and real user questions, not only synthetic examples or technical demos.

primary_sources.title: IBM Think - What is a feature store?
Google for Developers - Machine Learning Glossary

summary.zh: Grounding 是讓 AI 回答建立在指定資料來源或可驗證依據上，而不是自由發揮。
summary.en: A concept related to data preparation, retrieval, knowledge grounding, or document understanding in GenAI systems.

explanation.zh:
Grounding 是讓 AI 回答建立在指定資料來源或可驗證依據上，而不是自由發揮。它是降低幻覺與提高企業可用性的關鍵設計。

實務做法包括：提供內部文件作為回答依據、要求模型只根據資料回答、要求引用來源段落、文件沒有答案時明確說不知道。
explanation.en:
Grounding means tying a model’s response to specific source information, such as documents, database records, search results, or tool outputs.

A grounded answer should be traceable to evidence the system provided to the model. This helps reduce unsupported claims and makes answers easier to verify, especially in RAG, search-based Q&A, and tool-assisted workflows.

Grounding does not guarantee correctness by itself. If the retrieved sources are wrong, outdated, incomplete, or misinterpreted, the final answer can still be wrong.

pm_notes.zh:
對高風險決策、合規要求、使用者互動或正式營運流程，grounding非常重要。因為錯誤回答可能造成使用者誤解、服務品質問題、合規風險或營運風險。

可採取行動：對高風險回答要求附來源或可追溯 evidence，並在驗收時檢查關鍵主張是否真的被來源支持。
pm_notes.en: PMs should require grounding for important answers and define what evidence must be shown or logged. During testing, check whether key claims in the answer can actually be traced back to the provided sources. Validate it with real data and real user questions, not only synthetic examples or technical demos.

IBM Think - What is retrieval augmented generation (RAG)?

summary.zh: 知識庫是 AI 可查詢的資料集合，例如 FAQ、SOP、產品規格、法規文件、內部公告、客服手冊與專案文件。
summary.en: A concept related to data preparation, retrieval, knowledge grounding, or document understanding in GenAI systems.

explanation.zh:
知識庫是 AI 可查詢的資料集合，例如 FAQ、SOP、產品規格、法規文件、內部公告、客服手冊與專案文件。

在 GenAI 中，知識庫通常搭配 RAG（檢索增強生成）使用，作為模型回答問題的依據。知識庫品質要求包含文件正確、版本清楚、權限可控、格式適合切片與檢索、過期文件可識別。
explanation.en:
A knowledge base is a curated collection of information that an AI system can search or reference. It may include policies, FAQs, documentation, product rules, support articles, or internal procedures.

In RAG systems, knowledge-base quality directly affects answer quality. If the knowledge base contains outdated, duplicated, conflicting, or poorly structured content, the model may generate weak or incorrect answers.

A useful knowledge base needs clear ownership, versioning, update rules, permissions, and a process for removing obsolete content.

pm_notes.zh:
很多 GenAI 專案失敗不是因為模型不好，而是知識庫資料過期、矛盾、分散、格式不佳或權限設計不清楚。

可採取行動：建立文件清單，標註 owner、版本、有效日期、權限與更新頻率，並在上線前移除過期或互相矛盾的文件。
pm_notes.en: PMs should define document owners, update frequency, version rules, and access permissions. Outdated or conflicting knowledge is a common cause of wrong answers, even when the model itself is strong. Validate it with real data and real user questions, not only synthetic examples or technical demos.

primary_sources.title: IBM Think - What is retrieval augmented generation (RAG)?
Google Cloud Vertex AI - Grounding overview

summary.zh: Metadata 是描述資料的資料，例如文件標題、作者、建立日期、版本、有效日期、部門、權限、來源系統與文件類型。
summary.en: A concept related to data preparation, retrieval, knowledge grounding, or document understanding in GenAI systems.

explanation.zh:
Metadata 是描述資料的資料，例如文件標題、作者、建立日期、版本、有效日期、部門、權限、來源系統與文件類型。

在 RAG（檢索增強生成）中的重要性：Metadata 可協助檢索過濾，例如只查最新版本文件、只查某部門文件、只查有效日期內文件、依權限限制可見內容。
explanation.en:
Metadata is data that describes other data, such as title, author, source, date, version, document type, permissions, or tags.

In retrieval systems, metadata can be used to filter results and choose the right source before generation.

In retrieval and data workflows, the practical quality depends on source freshness, structure, access permissions, metadata, and how the content is prepared before the model uses it. Weak data preparation often appears later as weak model quality.

pm_notes.zh:
良好的 metadata 設計可大幅提升檢索品質與合規性。缺少 metadata 時，AI 容易引用過期或不適用文件。

可採取行動：在文件進知識庫前定義必填 metadata，例如來源部門、版本、有效日期、權限等級與文件類型。
pm_notes.en:
PMs should identify which metadata fields matter for retrieval, filtering, compliance, and user trust. Missing metadata can make RAG results harder to control.

Validate it with real data and real user questions, not only synthetic examples or technical demos.

primary_sources.title: IBM Think - What is metadata?
Google Cloud - About metadata management in Knowledge Catalog

summary.zh: OCR（光學文字辨識）是光學字元辨識，將圖片、掃描文件或影像中的文字轉換成可編輯、可搜尋文字。
summary.en: A technology for extracting text from images, scans, and document pages so the text can be searched, processed, or audited.

explanation.zh:
OCR（光學文字辨識）是光學字元辨識，將圖片、掃描文件或影像中的文字轉換成可編輯、可搜尋文字。

在 GenAI 中的角色：現在多模態 LLM 已能直接讀取圖片或 PDF，並從中擷取文字、理解版面與回答問題，因此不一定每個情境都要先用傳統 OCR。然而，在大量文件處理、需要可搜尋全文、需要穩定抽取表格/欄位、需要保存可稽核文字結果，或需要降低模型幻覺時，OCR 或文件解析服務仍然很重要。

實務上常見兩種做法：一種是先用 OCR/Document AI 抽取文字與版面結構，再交給 LLM 摘要、分類或問答；另一種是直接讓多模態 LLM 讀圖或讀 PDF。PM 需要根據文件量、準確率、成本、可追溯性與資料格式選擇流程。
explanation.en:
OCR, or optical character recognition, extracts text from images, scans, and document pages. It turns visual text into machine-readable text that can be searched, indexed, copied, or processed by downstream systems.

Modern multimodal LLMs can often read text directly from images or PDFs, so OCR is not always a required first step. However, OCR still matters for large-scale document processing, searchable archives, structured extraction, auditability, and workflows that need stable text outputs.

For production use, OCR quality depends on scan quality, layout complexity, tables, handwriting, language mix, and whether the extracted text preserves enough structure for the task.

pm_notes.zh:
掃描品質差、表格複雜、手寫文字、中英文混合、印章或浮水印都可能影響文字抽取品質，進而影響後續 RAG回答。即使使用多模態 LLM，也要驗證它是否真的讀到文件內容，而不是根據版面或上下文推測。

可採取行動：抽樣檢查文字抽取結果，特別是表格、金額、日期、產品代碼、條款編號與重要欄位，避免錯字或漏字進入知識庫。
pm_notes.en: PMs should not assume every PDF or image workflow needs standalone OCR, but they should ask how text is extracted, validated, stored, and audited. For high-volume or compliance-sensitive document workflows, OCR or document parsing may still be necessary.

primary_sources.title: IBM Think - What is optical character recognition (OCR)?
Microsoft Learn - OCR overview

summary.zh: RAG 是企業 GenAI 應用常見架構，核心是先從知識來源找出與問題相關的資料，再把資料交給 LLM（大型語言模型）生成回答。
summary.en: An architecture that retrieves relevant knowledge first, then uses that context to generate a grounded answer.

explanation.zh:
RAG 是企業 GenAI 應用常見架構，核心是先從知識來源找出與問題相關的資料，再把資料交給 LLM（大型語言模型）生成回答。它讓模型能根據最新、可信或企業內部資料回答，而不是只依賴模型訓練時學到的知識。

常見流程可以拆成兩段：第一段是知識庫建置，包含文件蒐集、解析、清理、chunking（文件切片）、產生 embedding（向量嵌入）、建立索引與 metadata（中繼資料）。第二段是線上問答流程，包含使用者提問、問題改寫或查詢擴展、向量搜尋或關鍵字搜尋、依相似度或規則取回 top-k 候選片段、必要時進行 reranking（重新排序），最後把挑選後的片段組成 context（上下文）交給模型生成回答。

實務上，RAG 也常搭配 hybrid retrieval（混合檢索），同時使用關鍵字搜尋與向量搜尋；也可能使用 metadata filter（例如版本、日期、文件類型、權限）縮小範圍。好的 RAG 不只是把文件塞進模型，而是要在 recall（找得夠全）、precision（找得夠準）、token 預算、延遲、來源可追溯性與答案 groundedness（定錨程度）之間取得平衡。

優點：可使用最新或內部資料、不必為了更新知識重新訓練模型、可降低幻覺、較容易引用來源與追溯答案依據。限制：品質高度取決於文件品質、切片策略、embedding 模型、檢索方法、top-k 設定、reranking、metadata 設計、prompt 設計與評估流程。若檢索錯資料，模型即使能力很強也可能回答錯。
explanation.en:
RAG, or retrieval-augmented generation, is an architecture that combines retrieval with generation. Instead of asking the model to answer only from its internal knowledge, the system first finds relevant information from a knowledge base, document store, search index, or vector database.

A typical RAG workflow includes document ingestion, chunking, embedding, indexing, retrieval, optional reranking, context assembly, and answer generation. Some systems use hybrid retrieval, combining keyword search with vector search, and metadata filters to narrow results by version, date, document type, permission, or source.

RAG can improve factuality, freshness, and traceability without retraining the model. However, its quality depends on source quality, chunking strategy, retrieval precision and recall, ranking, token budget, prompt design, and evaluation.

pm_notes.zh:
RAG 成敗取決於文件品質、chunking、embedding、retrieval、top-k 設定、reranking、prompt 與引用設計，不只是換模型。PM 需注意：top-k 設太小可能漏資料，設太大可能增加成本與雜訊；reranking 能提升相關性，但也會增加延遲與系統複雜度。

可採取行動：在 PoC（概念驗證）階段建立一組 RAG 測試題，包含問題、標準答案與正確來源文件，用來同時驗證檢索結果、reranking 效果與最終回答品質。
pm_notes.en: PMs should evaluate RAG as an end-to-end system, not just a model feature. During PoC, test both retrieval quality and final answer quality using realistic user questions, expected answers, and correct source documents. If the system retrieves the wrong context, even a strong model may produce a confident but incorrect answer.

primary_sources.title: IBM Think - What is retrieval augmented generation (RAG)?
Google Cloud Vertex AI - Grounding overview

entry_metadata.change_note: 發布前中文內容可讀性修正

summary.zh: Reranking 是在初步檢索後，再用更精細的模型或規則重新排序候選文件，讓最能回答問題的內容排在前面。
summary.en: A second-stage ranking step that reorders retrieved candidates by relevance before generation.

explanation.zh:
Reranking 是在初步檢索後，再用更精細的模型或規則重新排序候選文件，讓最能回答問題的內容排在前面。

成本面：Reranking 可能增加 latency（延遲時間）與運算成本，需要依任務風險與品質需求決定是否使用。
explanation.en:
Reranking is a second-stage retrieval step that reorders candidate results after an initial search.

The first search may return many semantically similar chunks. A reranker scores those candidates more carefully and helps choose the best evidence for the model context.

In retrieval and data workflows, the practical quality depends on source freshness, structure, access permissions, metadata, and how the content is prepared before the model uses it. Weak data preparation often appears later as weak model quality.

pm_notes.zh:
RAG通常只會把前幾筆文件送入模型，因此正確文件是否排在前面非常重要。Reranking 可改善 MRR、NDCG 與回答 groundedness。

可採取行動：要求 RAG 評估不只看是否找得到文件，也要看正確文件是否排在前幾名，例如 MRR 或 NDCG。
pm_notes.en:
PMs should consider reranking when RAG retrieves related but not precise results. It can improve quality, but may add latency and cost.

Validate it with real data and real user questions, not only synthetic examples or technical demos.

primary_sources.title: IBM Think - What is retrieval augmented generation (RAG)?
Ragas - Context Precision metric

summary.zh: Semantic search 是根據意思搜尋，而不是只比對關鍵字。
summary.en: A concept related to data preparation, retrieval, knowledge grounding, or document understanding in GenAI systems.

explanation.zh:
Semantic search 是根據意思搜尋，而不是只比對關鍵字。例如搜尋「年費減免」也可能找到「費用減免資格」或「費用優惠」。

技術原理：通常透過 embedding（向量嵌入）將查詢與文件轉成向量，再計算語意相似度。也可搭配關鍵字搜尋形成 hybrid search。
explanation.en:
Semantic search retrieves information based on meaning, not only exact keyword matches. It often uses embeddings to compare the user query with documents.

This helps users find relevant content even when they do not use the same wording as the source material.

In retrieval and data workflows, the practical quality depends on source freshness, structure, access permissions, metadata, and how the content is prepared before the model uses it. Weak data preparation often appears later as weak model quality.

pm_notes.zh:
語意搜尋適合自然語言問答，但若涉及精確條件，例如產品代碼、條款編號、日期版本，仍需搭配 metadata filter 或關鍵字搜尋。

可採取行動：針對精確條件型問題加入 metadata filter 或 keyword search 測試，避免只靠語意相似度。
pm_notes.en:
PMs should test semantic search with real user phrasing, synonyms, product names, and internal terminology. It may still need keyword search or filters for exact identifiers.

Validate it with real data and real user questions, not only synthetic examples or technical demos.

primary_sources.title: OpenAI API - Vector embeddings
Pinecone - What is a vector database?

summary.zh: Speech-to-text 是將語音轉成文字的技術，常用於會議記錄、客服錄音分析、語音助理與訪談整理。
summary.en: A concept related to data preparation, retrieval, knowledge grounding, or document understanding in GenAI systems.

explanation.zh:
Speech-to-text 是將語音轉成文字的技術，常用於會議記錄、客服錄音分析、語音助理與訪談整理。

GenAI 應用流程：錄音轉逐字稿，LLM（大型語言模型）摘要重點，產出待辦事項，分類議題，或生成會議紀錄。
explanation.en:
Speech-to-text converts spoken audio into written text. It is used for meeting transcripts, call analysis, voice interfaces, subtitles, and searchable audio records.

The quality depends on audio clarity, speaker overlap, accents, noise, domain vocabulary, and diarization needs.

In retrieval and data workflows, the practical quality depends on source freshness, structure, access permissions, metadata, and how the content is prepared before the model uses it. Weak data preparation often appears later as weak model quality.

pm_notes.zh:
需注意錄音品質、口音、專有名詞、多人對話辨識、講者分離、個資隱私與錄音授權。

可採取行動：用真實錄音樣本驗證專有名詞、講者分離與敏感資訊處理，並確認錄音授權與保存規則。
pm_notes.en:
PMs should test speech-to-text with realistic audio, not only clean demos. Pay attention to privacy, retention, speaker identification, and error correction workflows.

Validate it with real data and real user questions, not only synthetic examples or technical demos.

primary_sources.title: IBM Think - What is speech to text?
Microsoft Learn - Speech to text overview

entry_metadata.change_note: 發布前中文內容可讀性修正

summary.zh: Text-to-speech 是將文字轉換成語音的技術，可用於 AI 語音助理、文件朗讀、無障礙服務與語音通知。
summary.en: A concept related to data preparation, retrieval, knowledge grounding, or document understanding in GenAI systems.

explanation.zh:
Text-to-speech 是將文字轉換成語音的技術，可用於 AI 語音助理、文件朗讀、無障礙服務與語音通知。

若語音輸出會用於正式服務或使用者互動，內容仍需符合品牌、合規與審核要求，不能因為是語音形式就降低控管標準。
explanation.en:
Text-to-speech converts written text into spoken audio. It is used in voice agents, accessibility features, notifications, and audio content generation.

Voice quality includes pronunciation, pacing, tone, latency, and how well the voice fits the product experience.

In retrieval and data workflows, the practical quality depends on source freshness, structure, access permissions, metadata, and how the content is prepared before the model uses it. Weak data preparation often appears later as weak model quality.

pm_notes.zh: 若用於使用者互動，要注意語氣、速度、發音、品牌形象、語言支援，以及是否需要告知使用者正在與 AI 互動。
pm_notes.en:
PMs should review both content accuracy and voice experience. For customer-facing use, confirm brand tone, disclosure, and fallback behavior when generated speech is wrong or unclear.

Validate it with real data and real user questions, not only synthetic examples or technical demos.

primary_sources.title: IBM Think - What is text to speech?
Microsoft Learn - Text to speech overview

summary.zh: 向量資料庫是專門儲存與搜尋 embedding（向量嵌入）的資料庫，可快速找出與使用者問題語意最接近的文件段落。
summary.en: A database optimized for storing embeddings and retrieving semantically similar items.

explanation.zh:
向量資料庫是專門儲存與搜尋 embedding（向量嵌入）的資料庫，可快速找出與使用者問題語意最接近的文件段落。

技術原理：傳統資料庫多用精確條件搜尋，例如欄位等於某個值；向量資料庫則計算向量距離或相似度，找出語意接近的資料。
explanation.en:
A vector database stores embeddings and supports similarity search. Instead of only matching exact keywords, it can find content that is semantically close to a query.

In RAG systems, vector databases are commonly used to retrieve relevant document chunks before sending them to the model. Many implementations also store metadata such as document source, version, permissions, date, or content type.

A vector database improves retrieval flexibility, but it does not guarantee the correct answer. Search quality still depends on embeddings, chunking, filters, ranking, and source quality.

pm_notes.zh:
向量搜尋找的是「相似」，不等於一定正確。正式 RAG常需要搭配 metadata filter、關鍵字搜尋、權限過濾與 reranking，才能提高答案可靠度。

可採取行動：確認向量庫查詢是否套用權限過濾、metadata filter 與版本控制，避免檢索到不該使用或過期的文件。
pm_notes.en: PMs should confirm what content is indexed, which metadata filters are available, and how permissions are enforced. Vector search should be evaluated with real questions, not only technical similarity scores. Validate it with real data and real user questions, not only synthetic examples or technical demos.

primary_sources.title: Pinecone - What is a vector database?
IBM Think - What is retrieval augmented generation (RAG)?

summary.zh: 管理 AI 開發、使用、風險、責任、審核與監控的制度。
summary.en: A concept related to AI safety, risk management, privacy, compliance, or responsible AI practices.

explanation.zh:
AI Governance 是管理 AI 開發、使用、風險、責任、審核與監控的制度。它通常包含資料使用規範、模型風險分級、上線審核、權限控管、監控指標、事故處理與事後稽核。

對企業級 GenAI 專案來說，治理不是上線前補一份文件，而是從需求階段就定義 AI 可以做什麼、不能做什麼、誰負責審核、哪些情境需要人工介入，以及上線後如何追蹤風險。
explanation.en:
AI governance is the set of policies, roles, processes, and controls used to manage AI systems responsibly.

It covers areas such as risk classification, data use, model evaluation, security, privacy, monitoring, approval workflows, and accountability.

In production, this usually requires more than a policy statement. Teams need clear ownership, controls, monitoring, escalation paths, and evidence that the system behaves safely under realistic use.

pm_notes.zh:
企業級 GenAI 專案要從需求階段納入合規、資安、資料治理與風險管理，而不是上線前才補審核。

可採取行動：在立項時確認 use case 風險等級、必要審查單位、上線檢核項與上線後監控責任人。
pm_notes.en:
PMs should identify the required governance path early. For enterprise AI products, approvals and risk controls are part of delivery, not a final checklist.

Define the review, escalation, and monitoring process before the feature is exposed to real users or sensitive data.

primary_sources.title: IBM Think - What is AI governance?
NIST - AI Risk Management Framework
